aspects.description: Source code quality
judgementScoreDescription: source code is missing, not saved, or contains only default files without real markup
code is readable and understandable, but markup and style structure is not optimal: redundant rules, duplication, inappropriate tags, or weak CSS organization

repeated HTML and CSS fragments are minimized; semantic tags are used, classes are named consistently, styles are organized logically (e.g. grouped by blocks and sections); CSS duplication is kept to a minimum

HTML and CSS structure allows changes to be made easily without a full layout rewrite; best practices are applied: semantic markup, a consistent class naming system, modular styles, correct use of the cascade, no redundancy, and highly maintainable code

aspects.description: All pages include a header containing the required elements
aspects.extraDescription: Logo, navigation, Publish and View buttons. Deduct 0.25 for each error

aspects.description: Logo is taken from the provided media files
Header is sticky on all pages
Header buttons have correct URLs
aspects.extraDescription: Publish: For Seller page. View: For Buyer page

aspects.description: Header buttons have a data-type attribute with two style variants
Navigation contains all required links
Hovering a menu item displays the second-level navigation
Distinct styling for button types in the header
judgementScoreDescription: types are not implemented
types are implemented but differ only slightly or have a simple implementation
types are implemented and differ from each other, but the implementation is simple
types are implemented, clearly distinguishable, and look polished

aspects.description: Micro-animations for different button types in the header
judgementScoreDescription: types are not implemented, or implemented without micro-animations
types are implemented, but micro-animations do not meet requirements, do not follow standards, or look simplistic
types are implemented; micro-animations look acceptable but do not fit the design style
types are implemented, distinguishable, and look good

aspects.description: Home page contains all required sections
aspects.extraDescription: Header CTA, About the project, categories, benefits, footer CTA, testimonials, footer. Deduct 0.25 for each missing block

Footer contains a copyright notice with the current year
Footer contains a link to the policy page

design matches the task theme but looks simplistic
design matches the task theme and looks good, but there is room for improvement
design is excellent
